section.heading: Supplemental assistance to funds provided to local educational agencies

content.p: The assistance provided in this chapter for the education of Indians in the public schools of any State is in addition and supplemental to assistance provided under title VI of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965 [20 U.S.C. 7401 et seq.].

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning Pub. L. 93–638, Jan. 4, 1975, 88 Stat. 2203, known as the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under section 5301 of this title and Tables.

The Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965, referred to in text, is Pub. L. 89–10, Apr. 11, 1965, 79 Stat. 27. Title VI of the Act is classified generally to subchapter VI (§ 7401 et seq.) of chapter 70 of Title 20, Education. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under section 6301 of Title 20 and Tables.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 458e of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2015—Pub. L. 114–95 substituted “assistance provided under title VI of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965.” for “assistance provided under title IX of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965.”
1994—Pub. L. 103–382 substituted “title IX of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965” for “title IV of the Act of June 23, 1972 (86 Stat. 235)”.
